neo-llvm
GitHub Discord

Write Neo N3 Smart Contracts in Rust

Compile Rust smart contracts to NeoVM bytecode through a WebAssembly pipeline. Production-ready with 500+ tests, 17 example contracts, and cross-chain support.
Get Started View on GitHub
Rust Contract→cargo build (wasm32)→Wasm Module→wasm-neovm→NEF + Manifest

Rust-Native SDK

Write contracts using familiar Rust syntax with #[neo_contract], #[neo_method], and #[neo_event] macros. Full type system with NeoInteger, NeoByteString, NeoStorage, and more. Explore the SDK →

17 Production Examples

From hello-world to Uniswap V2 AMMs, flashloan pools, and NFT marketplaces. Every contract compiles, tests, and deploys to Neo N3. Browse examples →

Cross-Chain Ready

Compile Solana programs and Move contracts to NeoVM. Drop-in compatibility layers map familiar APIs to Neo syscalls. Learn more →

Write a Contract in Rust

Build and deploy in two commands:

Neo N3 3.9.1 500+ Tests NEP-17 / NEP-11 Solana Compatible MIT License
